events.title: Pre-WAM Ride
events.description: Meet at the Boat Launch at Riverside Park in Grand Rapids at 8am. This will be a no drop ride, but please be able to ride at a moderate pace of 13mph average and be ready for up to a 70 mile ride. The route will be somewhere in length between 50-70 miles. Leave a comment if you have a preference on length.
events.address: Riverside Park, Grand Rapids, MI, USA
